name: Base Wall: Line of Obstruction
description: A low wall surrounding the Kerplunk-a-tron Windmill Base, crafted from sturdy metal panels. Its design was inspired by Nod-Krai's hard-fought battles against the Wild Hunt. Striking a balance between performance, cost-effectiveness, and ease of installation, this wall provides reliable and ample cover for shooters.\nToday, at the Kerplunk-a-tron Windmill Base, this type of low wall has been repurposed as a divider, creating distinct areas while preserving a clear line of sight throughout the base.
